note: Co-pay of $40 per dancer for studio costume, collected via Square at recent classes. See square/sales_summary_ytd_2026.json category 'Costume Co-Pay (showcase)' for the per-dancer receipts (18 collected to date). Outstanding co-pays from dancers who have not yet paid are tracked here.
note_on_cash_position: If all 16 outstanding co-pays land before Nov 1 that's $640 in. Combined with the $700 already in (18 x $40 less Square fee), the studio is covered against the $1,360 invoice with $20 to spare. If 4 or more co-pays slip past Nov 1, Amanda is short on the costume line and the gap pulls from the studio operating account.
